name: Bean & Rice Burgers
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Cooked beans (such as kidney or navy)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a greased grill or electric frying pan on medium heat. Alternatively, grease a 13" x 9" glass baking pan and bake at 350°F for 30 minutes. Spread the mixture in the pan and cook uncovered.
2. Mash the beans.
3. Add all ingredients and mix well. If using all of the listed ingredients, your mixture may be slightly dry. You might need to add a quarter to half cup of soy, nut, or rice milk (or whole milk). Be sure not to thin it too much; you want a "hamburger" consistency.
4. Spoon about 2 heaping tablespoons of mix onto the grill or frying pan for each burger and flatten with the greased pancake turner.
5. Turn several times rather than just once on each side (as with conventional burgers) for a better texture.
